chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. C.P D-770 of 2023: Nazar Muhammad Unar and others vs. S.H.O. P.S. Allahabad and others. For the Petitioners: Mr. Arif Ali Kalhoro, Advocate For Official Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General, Sindh assisted by Mr. Abdul Waris Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w SIP Ali Dost. Date of hearing: 30.04.2024 Date of Order: 30.04.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. This petition has been filed essentially seeking declaration of title in respect of immovable property. Learned counsel was confronted as to how such a claim could be entertained in writ jurisdiction and he remained unable to justify such invocation. In view hereof, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge
